## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (not just how). Link related issues if any. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Security-related

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual check (describe briefly): <!-- e.g. login, WebSocket updates, restart a service -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused; PR description explains **why**
- [ ] No `.env`, session files, or other runtime `data/` state committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour, config, or public API changed
